log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:10+3=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:19+-2=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:8+-2=6 vs DC 16] FAIL!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Kalashtar — Bardic Musician.
→ Javelin: [d20:19+6=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 10 damage. Kalashtar — Bardic Musician HP: 57/67
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
--- Kalashtar — Bardic Musician --- HP: 57/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
